title: cyclone operation
description: Gas-solid cyclone separator.  Hardware: the body diameter (and effective number of turns).  The cut diameter d50, the grade-efficiency curve η(d), the collection efficiency and the pressure drop ΔP are RESULTS.  The collection correlation is a SELECTABLE sub-model (model keyword) -- simple data-anchored correlations, swap to compare.  Needs a particle-size distribution on the feed (solids block) and a transport model for the gas viscosity.

bodyDiameter.title: Body diameter D_c
bodyDiameter.description: Cyclone body diameter [m].  Sets the inlet area (D_c^2/8) and width (D_c/4) of the Lapple standard geometry.

numberOfTurns.title: Effective turns N_e
numberOfTurns.description: Effective number of gas revolutions (typical ~5).  More turns -> smaller d50 -> finer cut.

C.title: Leith-Licht constant C
C.description: Geometric-configuration constant for the LeithLicht model (default 402.88, calibratable).

beta.title: Logistic slope β
beta.description: Grade-efficiency slope for IoziaLeith (default 3.5), Barth (default 4) and Muschelknautz internal (default 3).  Lapple is the β=2 special case.

alpha.title: Barth tangential factor α
alpha.description: Tangential-velocity factor v_θ = α·v_i on the control surface (Barth, default 1.5, calibratable).

heightFactor.title: Barth CS height factor
heightFactor.description: Control-surface height H_cs/D_c for the Barth model (default 2, calibratable).

cLimit.title: Muschelknautz limit loading
cLimit.description: Limit solids loading c_lim [kg solid/kg gas] for the Muschelknautz mass-loading effect (default 0.05, calibratable).  Above it, surplus solids are mass-separated near 100 %.
